name: Veggie Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lg pkg crescent dinner rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll one package of crescent dinner rolls and bake them in a 9 x 13 inch pan. Cool.
2. Mix the cream cheese, mayonnaise, and Hidden Valley Ranch dressing. Spread over the baked dinner rolls.
3. Cover and refrigerate several hours or overnight.
4. An hour before serving time, cover with chopped vegetables such as broccoli, green onions, radishes, cauliflower, celery, etc. Sprinkle with grated cheese and garnish with sliced olives, pieces of tomato, or any other desired toppings. Almost anything goes well.
5. Cover with Saran wrap and press down slightly to set the vegetables in the cream cheese.
